name: aurora-range-slider
title: Aurora RangeSlider
author: jmagar <https://github.com/jmagar>
docs:
Aurora RangeSlider is an Aurora UI component for Claude Design parity surfaces.

Install `aurora-tokens` and `aurora-components` first; the shadcn CLI resolves these automatically through the @aurora registry namespace.

Default install target: `@ui/aurora/range-slider.tsx`.

Registry dependencies: `aurora-tokens`, `aurora-components`.
